# Timing Log Average Runtime Review

Source folder reviewed: `Master_List/Reports/Timing Log for Review` from `origin/main`.

Scope: all Section D / Detailed Timing Log steps plus process-run totals for `Create Monthly Start`, `Format Monthly Sheets`, `Create / Refresh All Templates`, and `Create Monthly Update`. Each repeated process run within the same PDF receives its own occurrence number.

## Method

| Step | Detail |
|---|---|
| Source acquisition | Exported all PDFs from `origin/main:Master_List/Reports/Timing Log for Review` to `/tmp/timing_pdfs` without modifying or staging binary report files. |
| Text extraction | Used `pypdf` to extract PDF text into `/tmp/timing_txt`. |
| Step selection | Parsed `SECTION D - DETAILED TIMING LOG` rows for the four requested workflows. |
| Multiple runs | A new run occurrence is started when the same process row emits `Start` again or its cumulative total resets. |
| Total time | Process-run total is the maximum cumulative `Total Seconds` observed for that process run. |
| Average step time | The final step-detail column is the arithmetic mean of the exact step label within the same workflow across all reviewed logs. |
